name: Marbleized Mint Bank
recipeIngredient: 1 lb vanilla flavored candy, cut up
3/4 cup candy canes or peppermint candies, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a baking sheet with foil and set aside.
2. In a double boiler, heat chocolate pieces over low heat, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth. Remove from heat.
3. In another double boiler, heat candy coating over low heat, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in crushed candies.
5. Pour the melted coating mixture onto the prepared baking sheet.
6. Spread the coating mixture to about a 3/8 inch thickness.
7. Drizzle with melted chocolate.
8. Gently zigzag a narrow metal spatula through chocolate and peppermint layers to create a swirled effect.
9. Let candy stand several hours or until firm (candy can be chilled for 30 minutes or until firm).
10. Use foil to lift the candy from the baking sheet.
11. Carefully break into pieces.
12. Store, lightly covered, for up to 2 weeks. Makes about 1 1/4 pounds.
